CreateClaim.description: Grants permission to create a User subscription Claim

DeleteClaim.description: Grants permission to delete a User subscription Claim

ListApplicationClaims.description: Grants permission to list all User subscription Claims for Application

ListClaims.description: Grants permission to list all User subscription Claims

ListUserSubscriptions.description: Grants permission to list all User subscriptions

SetOverageConfig.description: Grants permission to set a User subscription overage configuration

UpdateClaim.description: Grants permission to update a User subscription Claim

user-subscriptions:CreateForSelf.description: Filters access by only allowing creation of User subscription Claims for the caller
